HomePage.title: ABB Terra
HomePage.tag2: Starts from Rp10 Million, free installation.

hero.heading: Sleek. Safe. Smart. ABB Terra EV Chargers
hero.subheading: Join 7,000+ happy EV owners across Indonesia. Power up your electric vehicle with the world's most trusted charging technology. Complete installation support included.

products.title: ABB Terra EV Charger Series
products.subtitle: Choose the perfect charger for your home, retail space, or commercial building. Engineered for maximum safety and efficiency.
products.ac_desc: A compact, smart charging solution available in 7.4kW, 11kW, and 22kW capacities. Equipped with built-in load management and multiple safety features.
products.dc_desc: Quickly charge your EV in 30-60 minutes. Standard capacities of 24kW up to 50kW. Built for commercial applications and retail spaces.
products.ac_spec4: Safety: Overcurrent, Overvoltage, Ground Fault Protection
products.dc_spec4: Safety: Advanced Thermal Control, Input/Output Protection

benefits.title: Designed for Safety & Peace of Mind
benefits.subtitle: We don't just sell chargers; we deliver a complete, worry-free electrical infrastructure.
benefits.point1_desc: We supply direct, genuine ABB products. All auxiliary electrical components (MCBs, cables, RCBOs) are authentic ABB parts, ensuring optimal safety.
benefits.point2_desc: As Indonesia's leading installation partner, we have successfully deployed thousands of chargers in homes, offices, and shopping malls.
benefits.point3_desc: Our certified engineers handle survey, installation, grid connection (PLN power upgrade), testing, and training until the unit is fully operational.
benefits.point4_desc: Charge with total peace of mind. Get a comprehensive 2-year unit replacement warranty for manufacturing defects (subject to terms).

estimator.title: Charging Time & Savings Estimator
estimator.subtitle: Find out how fast an ABB Terra charger can power your electric vehicle compared to a standard wall plug, and see your fuel cost savings.
estimator.savings_desc: Based on driving 1,500 km/month compared to a conventional petrol car.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Got questions about power upgrades, warranty, or installation? We have answers.
faq.q1: Can my home electricity handle an EV Charger?
faq.a1: Most EV chargers require at least 7.4 kW. We provide full support to handle PLN power upgrade applications and install safe sub-distribution panels with genuine ABB MCBs.
faq.q2: What is included in the 'Installation Support until Operational'?
faq.a2: We conduct a pre-installation site survey, prepare drawings, install the charger, wire up to the main/sub panel with high-safety RCBO/MCB, test grounding, and configure the ABB charger app on your phone.
faq.q3: What are the terms for the 2-Year Unit Replacement Warranty?
faq.a3: The warranty covers any component failure due to manufacturing defects. It is valid when the unit is installed by Elmecon's certified technicians and protected with official ABB surge protection and MCBs.
faq.q4: How do I claim a promotional code?
faq.a4: Click any of our WhatsApp consultation buttons. A special promo code will be automatically filled into your chat template for our sales team to apply to your quotation.

whatsapp.hello: Hi, I would like a free consultation for an ABB Terra EV Charger.

HeroCarousel.desc1: Proven experience delivering EV charging solutions for homes and businesses across Indonesia.
HeroCarousel.desc2: Genuine ABB charging solutions backed by expert consultation and after-sales support.
HeroCarousel.desc3: We handle the installation process from start to finish, ensuring your charger works properly.
HeroCarousel.desc4: Charge with confidence knowing expert support is always available when you need it.
